name: RM_OVERLAY
documentation: Container object for archetype statements relating to RM attributes, which may be directly on objects constrained within the archetype, or at deeper non-constrained RM paths from an object or the root.

rm_visibility.name: rm_visibility
rm_visibility.documentation: Optional structure in which visibility and aliasing of reference model elements can be specified. Key is path to an RM attribute, which is typically formed from a path to an archetyped node concatenated with a further pure RM attribute path; may also refer to a non-archetyped attribute.
